headline: Packaging Corporation of America Seen Benefiting From Pricing Power Amid Tight Supply, UBS Says

headline: Stocks Rally as Crude Oil and Bond Yields Slump
summary: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) today is up +0.78%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI ) (DIA ) is up +0.75%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) is up +1.24%. June E-mini S&P futures (ESM26 ) are up +0.70%, and June E-mini Nasdaq futures...

headline: UBS Upgrades Packaging Corp of America to Buy, Raises Price Target to $248
summary: UBS  analyst Anojja Shah   upgrades Packaging Corp of America (NYSE:PKG) from Neutral to Buy and raises the price target from $232 to $248.
